name: Local Biz Ops · Job complete → review request

nodes.name: Wait (review delay)
nodes.notes: Best practice: ask 1-2 days after the job, not at completion. Mirror opsConfig.reviewRequest.delayDays.

nodes.name: Send review request (GBP link)
nodes.notes: The admin sends the templated review email containing the Google Business Profile review link (GOOGLE_REVIEW_URL). Idempotent: skips if already sent.
